gist.headline: Pinning down the auth
gist.blurb: We pinned our auth dependency to keep the local dev servers humming happily. No more missing API key plugins!
gist.summary: Pinned the better-auth dependency to version 1.4.17 to resolve a breaking change introduced in their 1.5.x release.
gist.impact: Developers can now start the local dev server and run tests without encountering API key plugin errors.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee using a giant thumbtack to pin a glowing padlock (representing auth) to a server rack, while the Nomnom creature eats broken code.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, using a giant shiny thumbtack to pin a glowing digital padlock to a retro server rack. The round Nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating a piece of paper with broken code. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
